title: cardinality of expression is wrong
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT, age INT, name VARCHAR(50), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO t1 (id, age, name) VALUES (1, 25, 'Alice'), (2, 30, 'Bob'), (3, NULL, 'Charlie'), (4, 25, 'David');
CREATE TABLE t2 (id INT, score FLOAT, FOREIGN KEY (id) REFERENCES t1(id));
INSERT INTO t2 (id, score) VALUES (1, 85.5), (2, 90.0), (3, 75.0), (4, NULL);
SELECT id, age, COUNT(*) FROM t1 GROUP BY id, age HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
